description: If you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this blue and green backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack!Height: 42 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 13 cmCapacity: 23 litresMade of 100% polyester for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityOne main zipped compartment to accommodate all your essentials with a mesh zipped pocketOne zipped pocket with nike swoosh printed on the frontOne removable zipped pouch for added style Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyNike Swoosh in stitch detailingHaul loop for handling easeBranded zips and sliders for easy useCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
